summary.brief: Array Networks ArrayOS AG added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation. · Pluck-cms Pluck: public exploit or PoC linked · Apache Dolphinscheduler — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 7.3% → 21% · rising (+14%)). · 7 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.
bullets: Array Networks ArrayOS AG added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation.
Pluck-cms Pluck: public exploit or PoC linked
Apache Dolphinscheduler — exploitation likelihood rose sharply (EPSS 7.3% → 21% · rising (+14%)).
7 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.

digest.description: D-Link Go-RT-AC750 GORTAC750_revA_v101b03 and GO-RT-AC750_revB_FWv200b02 are vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via cgibin, hnap_main,
digest.title: D-Link Routers Buffer Overflow Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

descriptions.value: D-Link Go-RT-AC750 GORTAC750_revA_v101b03 and GO-RT-AC750_revB_FWv200b02 are vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via cgibin, hnap_main,
D-Link Go-RT-AC750 versiones GORTAC750_revA_v101b03 y GO-RT-AC750_revB_FWv200b02, son vulnerables al desbordamiento del búfer por medio de cgibin, hnap_main,

digest.description: An issue was discovered in Pluck before 4.7.7-dev2. /data/inc/images.php allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP code by using the image/jpeg content type for a .htaccess file.
digest.title: pluck-cms pluck

descriptions.value: An issue was discovered in Pluck before 4.7.7-dev2. /data/inc/images.php allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP code by using the image/jpeg content type for a .htaccess file.

Se ha descubierto un problema en Pluck en versiones anteriores a la 4.7.7-dev2. /data/inc/images.php permite que los atacantes remotos suban y ejecutan código PHP arbitrario utilizando el tipo de contenido image/jpeg para un archivo .htaccess.

digest.description: Alarm instance management has command injection when there is a specific command configured. It is only for logged-in users. We recommend you upgrade to version 2.0.6 or higher
digest.title: apache dolphinscheduler Command Injection

descriptions.value: Alarm instance management has command injection when there is a specific command configured. It is only for logged-in users. We recommend you upgrade to version 2.0.6 or higher
Alarm instance management tiene inyección de comandos cuando hay un comando específico configurado. Es sólo para usuarios registrados. Le recomendamos actualizar a la versión 2.0.6 o superior.

digest.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Novell eDirectory 8.7.3 before 8.7.3.10b, and 8.8 before 8.8.2 FTF2, allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via an LDAP search request containing "NULL search parameters."
digest.title: novell edirectory Buffer Overflow

descriptions.value: Heap-based buffer overflow in Novell eDirectory 8.7.3 before 8.7.3.10b, and 8.8 before 8.8.2 FTF2, allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via an LDAP search request containing "NULL search parameters."

Desbordamiento de búfer basado en montículo en Novell eDirectory 8.7.3 anterior a 8.7.3.10b, y 8.8 anterior a 8.8.2 FTF2, permite a atacantes remotos ejecutar código de su elección mediante una solicitud de búsqueda LDAP que contenga "parámetros de búsqueda nulos".

digest.description:
Remote shell service (RSH) in Infinera MTC-9 version R22.1.1.0275 allows
 an attacker to utilize password-less user accounts and obtain 
system access by activating a reverse shell.This issue affects MTC-9: from R22.1.1.0275 before R23.0.
digest.title: nokia infinera_mtc-9_firmware

descriptions.value:
Remote shell service (RSH) in Infinera MTC-9 version R22.1.1.0275 allows
 an attacker to utilize password-less user accounts and obtain 
system access by activating a reverse shell.This issue affects MTC-9: from R22.1.1.0275 before R23.0.

digest.description:
Improper configuration of the SSH service in Infinera MTC-9 allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands and access data on file system

.


This issue affects MTC-9: from R22.1.1.0275 before R23.0.
digest.title: nokia infinera_mtc-9_firmware

descriptions.value:
Improper configuration of the SSH service in Infinera MTC-9 allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands and access data on file system

.


This issue affects MTC-9: from R22.1.1.0275 before R23.0.

digest.description: In multiple locations, there is a possible way to launch an application from the background due to a precondition check failure. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.
digest.title: google android privilege escalation

descriptions.value: In multiple locations, there is a possible way to launch an application from the background due to a precondition check failure. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

digest.description: Emlog Pro 2.5.20 has an arbitrary file deletion vulnerability. This vulnerability stems from the admin/template.php component and the admin/plugin.php component. They fail to perform path verification and dangerous code filtering for deletion parameters, allowing attackers to exploit this feature for directory traversal.
digest.title: emlog emlog Directory Traversal

descriptions.value: Emlog Pro 2.5.20 has an arbitrary file deletion vulnerability. This vulnerability stems from the admin/template.php component and the admin/plugin.php component. They fail to perform path verification and dangerous code filtering for deletion parameters, allowing attackers to exploit this feature for directory traversal.

digest.description: SQL injection vulnerability in /php/api_patient_schedule.php in SourceCodester Patients Waiting Area Queue Management System v1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the appointmentID parameter.
digest.title: pamzey patients_waiting_area_queue_management_system SQL Injection

descriptions.value: SQL injection vulnerability in /php/api_patient_schedule.php in SourceCodester Patients Waiting Area Queue Management System v1 allows attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the appointmentID parameter.

digest.description: NUT-14 allows cashu tokens to be created with a preimage hash. However, nutshell (cashubtc/nuts) before 0.18.0 do not validate the size of preimage when the token is spent. The preimage is stored by the mint and attacker can exploit this vulnerability to fill the mint's db nd disk with arbitrary data.
digest.title: cashu nutshell

descriptions.value: NUT-14 allows cashu tokens to be created with a preimage hash. However, nutshell (cashubtc/nuts) before 0.18.0 do not validate the size of preimage when the token is spent. The preimage is stored by the mint and attacker can exploit this vulnerability to fill the mint's db nd disk with arbitrary data.

digest.description: A cryptanalytic break in Altcha Proof-of-Work obfuscation mode version 0.8.0 and later allows for remote visitors to recover the Proof-of-Work nonce in constant time via mathematical deduction. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because the product's objective is "to discourage automated scraping / bots, not guarantee resistance to determined attackers." The documentation states “the goal is not to provide a secure cryptographic algorithm but to use a proof-of-work mechanism that allows any capable device to decrypt the hidden data.”
digest.title: A cryptanalytic break in Altcha Proof-of-Work obfuscation mode version 0.8.0 and later allows for remote visitors to recover the Proof-of...

descriptions.value: A cryptanalytic break in Altcha Proof-of-Work obfuscation mode version 0.8.0 and later allows for remote visitors to recover the Proof-of-Work nonce in constant time via mathematical deduction. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because the product's objective is "to discourage automated scraping / bots, not guarantee resistance to determined attackers." The documentation states “the goal is not to provide a secure cryptographic algorithm but to use a proof-of-work mechanism that allows any capable device to decrypt the hidden data.”

digest.description: Array Networks ArrayOS AG before 9.4.5.9 allows command injection, as exploited in the wild in August through December 2025.
digest.title: Array Networks ArrayOS AG OS Command Injection Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Array Networks ArrayOS AG OS Command Injection Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Array Networks ArrayOS AG before 9.4.5.9 allows command injection, as exploited in the wild in August through December 2025.
Array Networks ArrayOS AG anterior a 9.4.5.9 permite la inyección de comandos, tal como fue explotado en el mundo real entre agosto y diciembre de 2025.
